name: The Pub at Donner Lake
self_description: Fresh food. Friendly Service. Beautiful Views. We're your neighborhood home

name: The Richardson House
self_description: We are proud of The Richardson House and relish in its history and beauty. Our mission is to create an experience worthy of the house's beautiful surroundings in what will be an incredible getaway.

name: The Truckee Hotel
self_description: Established in 1873, the Truckee Hotel is a staple in tales of Truckee's past. Touched by many as a stagecoach stop on the Dutch Flat Wagon Road, the Truckee Hotel remains a drop-in for Sierra visitors, historians, adventure seekers, foodies, actors, and musicians.

name: Truckee Donner Lodge
self_description: Located in the town of Truckee, CA amidst mountains, lakes, alpines, and meadows, the Truckee Donner Lodge is a warm relaxing space so you can rest and recharge. Our lodge combines modern luxuries and contemporary decor with the traditional amenities and architecture of a country lodge.

name: Truckee River Winery
self_description: Since 1989, the Jones family has been dedicated to the artistry of high-altitude viticulture. What began as Truckee River Winery has grown into Truckee Family Wines, now encompassing both our original homestead in Truckee and our new 174 Winery in Cedar Ridge, CA.

name: Tuscany Gardens Pizzeria
self_description: You don't have to go far to get an authentic taste of Italy. Our family has owned and operated our two stores for over 30 years!

name: Twelve 28 Kitchen
self_description: A warm & comfortable social gathering place where our passion is on food that we make from the heart and the people we get to enjoy it with!

name: West River House
self_description: West River House is a historic gem nestled in the heart of downtown Truckee, North Lake Tahoe. Whether you are just passing through on the train or here for a ski, mountain bike or family vacation, we keep things simple and efficient to provide you with the best value.

name: Zano's Family Italian & Pizzeria
self_description: Our restaurant combines the flavor of Italy with the hospitality of the Sierra Nevada. This is a warm and friendly environment and we would like to keep it that way. At Zano's, we feel that it is simply a genuine belief in ourselves that sets us apart from the competition.

name: Made By Me in Truckee
self_description: Step into Made By Me, a delightful creative haven in downtown Truckee, California, founded by Suzette Birnbaum, who earned her degree in education and art from Santa Clara University. With a rich background in art and education, Suzette invites you to explore your artistic side in a space designed for creativity and connection.
